name: blue-sage/process-steps
title: BS — Process / Steps
description: Numbered steps or vertical timeline layout to communicate process, workflow, or milestones.

default.title: Discover
default.body: We start with a deep dive into your goals, audience, and competitive landscape to build a solid strategic foundation.

default.title: Design
default.body: Our design team crafts high-fidelity mockups that balance visual impact with clear user experience principles.

default.title: Build
default.body: Engineering brings the designs to life using modern, performant tooling with clean, maintainable code.

default.title: Launch
default.body: We deploy, monitor, and iterate. You go live with confidence knowing everything has been tested and verified.
